gold: Ya, ya, yo ya lo recibí.
predicted: Ya, ya, ya está. Ya lo recibí.
werNormalizedGold: ya ya yo ya lo recibí
werNormalizedPredicted: ya ya ya esta ya lo recibi
sigWerNormalizedGold: ya ya yo ya lo recibí
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: ya ya ya esta ya lo recibi

sigWerErrors.reason: The extra 'ya' does not change the overall meaning of the sentence, as it is a repetition of an interjection.
Substituting 'yo' (I) with 'esta' (this) changes the subject and alters the meaning of the sentence significantly.
